Content:
- Lassonde School of Engineering; Iron Ring Recipient.
- Focus: Machine Design; Finite Element Analysis (FEA); Safety Engineering; Aerospace Structures.

Title: Technical Skills | assets/images/lightning.svg
Content:
- Engineering: RAMS (Reliability; Availability; Maintainability; Safety); DFM; GD&T; OHSA Compliance.
- Design/Analysis: SolidWorks (CSWA); Fusion 360; KiCAD; FEA (Stress Analysis).
- Manufacturing: Manual Lathe & Mill; Waterjet; 3D Printing; Lockout/Tagout (LOTO).
- Tools: Excel (KPI Dashboards); MATLAB; Technical Documentation.

Title: Production Associate (Co-op) | [[Honda]] of Canada Mfg. | assets/images/Honda-logo.png
Content:
- **Systems Digitization:** Engineered an automated Excel-based KPI dashboard to monitor real-time line downtime; optimizing Availability during a major facility expansion. 
- **High-Voltage Safety Compliance:** Executed Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) protocols for 300V systems during the 2023 CR-V Hybrid launch; ensuring zero safety incidents.
- **Logistics & Traceability:** Managed VIN synchronization within GALC systems to maintain 100% process compliance for retrofit operations.
- **Quality Assurance:** Standardized pneumatic water-leak testing protocols to eliminate downstream defects in assembly.

Title: Mechanical Research Assistant | [[SARIT]] Micro-mobility | assets/images/SARIT-logo.png-theme
Content:
- **Structural Optimization:** Engineered a heavy-duty hitch assembly validated via FEA (SF 5.0) for dynamic shock load resilience.
- **Power Distribution Design:** Developed 48V-to-12V PDU for telemetry hardware; utilized KiCAD for electrical architecture mapping and root cause analysis of parasitic drain.
- **Fleet Implementation:** Leveraged rapid prototyping to design side-mirror hardware currently deployed across the EV test fleet.

Title: Mechanical Team Lead | [[York University Robotics Society]] | assets/images/YURS-logo.png
Content:
- **Strategic Engineering Leadership:** Spearheaded the mechanical division for the 2024 competition fleet; achieving 100% hardware reliability throughout the event.
- **Value Engineering:** Developed a high-torque end-effector using upcycled industrial components; meeting performance specs with zero budget impact. 
- **MTTR Optimization:** Standardized modular design interfaces to minimize Mean Time To Repair (MTTR) during field operations.

Title: Mechanical Team Member | [[Arbalest Rocketry]] | assets/images/Arbalest-logo.png
Content:
- **Precision Machining:** Fabricated flight-critical steel nosecone assemblies on a manual lathe to aerospace-grade tolerances.
- **Hybrid Material Integration:** Engineered a self-aligning tapered interface to secure steel-to-fiberglass joints; maintaining aerodynamic profile despite composite variances.
